name: Fenix
author: Fred Horn (1975, as Strike; published by HUCH! 2019); AGP port

labels.original: Original (Strike): setup stacks must be adjacent

description: Fenix (Fred Horn, conceived 1974 as Strike, published by HUCH! 2019): checkers-style forced jump captures meet chess-style piece values on a 9x9 board. In your first five turns you stack your own discs into 3 Generals and a King; captured Generals and even the King can rise from the ashes by re-stacking Soldiers. Capture the enemy King so it cannot be rebuilt to win.
